findings.title: Added JSON is syntactically invalid
findings.evidence: The new `more` entry starts a string value that includes JSON-looking text and then closes at `"malicious"`, leaving `: "true` as invalid syntax. This will make `config.json` fail to parse anywhere it is loaded.
findings.suggested_comment: This change appears to make `config.json` invalid JSON. The `more` value contains JSON-looking text and an embedded quote before `: "true`, so consumers will fail while parsing the config. Please escape the payload as a valid string or represent it as structured JSON explicitly.
findings.fix_hint: Validate the post-image with a JSON parser. If this content is intended as data, keep all injected braces/comments/quotes inside a properly escaped string or move it into valid structured fields.
